content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch loaders.py only.

agent2: I'm adding an optional path_transform=callable param to loaders too, touching FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source (and other loader classes' __init__/get_source). Overlap likely in FileSystemLoader. I'll keep changes additive (new param + a couple lines) so merge should be easy - I'll resolve conflicts on my end when merging your branch in at the end. Let me know your final __init__ signature for FileSystemLoader when done.

agent2: merged your fallback_searchpath work into my branch, resolved the FileSystemLoader conflict (both params coexist: path_transform applied first, then chain(searchpath, fallback_searchpath) is searched). All 841 tests pass, patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD contains both features. Pushed to team/agent2.
